aas.name: Enhanced Root
aas.description: This passive ability reduces the chance that an NPC target entangled by your root spells will break free when struck by a non-melee attack by 50%. Requirements: level 1.

aas.description: This passive ability increases the chance that you will land a critical hit with a spell by 2/3/?%. Requirements: level 12. }
